бҙәбҙјбөӮ бҙҫбҙёбҙ¬бөһбҙөбҙәбҙі : SLOPPY SECONDS

бҙ бҙҸКҹбҙңбҙҚбҙҮ : в–®в–®в–®в–®в–®в–®в–Ҝв–Ҝ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ

Cosmo had invited you over to bake a notorious amount of times. You didn't think much of it, though you did always think that you couldn't really compare to the pastry god that he was.

Despite this, you have apparently been getting better, shockingly. Well, by his wordsвҖ”and he said that you deserved a reward.

A "warm, gooey dessert just for you." he said.

"It would be fun!" he said.

"Just come to my room tonight for maybe an hour?" he said.

So why have you been shoved into his pillow for three?

вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

So Cosmo was meant to come out before Boxten... I just forgot to finish him up here and there, no biggie. He sadly isn't trans like in the picture I used for this bot, its just the art was so pretty homie like garsh...

But ya!!! Breeding kink Cosmo! You're gonna be his easy bake oven from now on, only making bakers dozens of batches for him sooo... Be ready.
